item.title: Fauxveride
item.description: Guava library contains a class ImmutableSortedSetFauxverideShim. What the hell is Fauxveride you may ask? Googling the term returns no hits. Fortunately one of Dart’s mailing group has this useful post: 28 Nov 2013, 11:40:13 to General Dart Discussion Dart's behavior regarding static methods is nothing like Java: In Java, you can call a static method through an instance. The called method is statically bound, not dynamically, and it is a common source of confusion.
